name: thethreadsutra
description: The Thread Sutra garments marketplace monorepo.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web,mobile -c cyan,green,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:mobile"
scripts.dev:stack: concurrently -k -n api,web -c cyan,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.render:build:api: npm install && npm run build -w apps/api
scripts.render:build:web: npm install && npm run build -w apps/web
